title: Remove SVG icon from header button

requirements.text: In the Navbar component, remove the SVG icon element inside the first button in the header's top-left area. The button element itself should remain, but the inner <svg> (and its wrapping <span> if it becomes empty) should be completely removed.
acceptanceCriteria: The SVG icon previously inside the header button at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/header[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/button[1]/span[1]/svg[1] is no longer rendered
No broken layout or empty space is introduced where the SVG was
The rest of the Navbar remains visually and functionally unchanged

constraints: Do not remove the button element itself, only its inner SVG (and any now-empty wrapping span)
nonGoals: Modifying any other part of the Navbar or header
Changing button functionality or click handlers
